title: Load Replay Smoke Report
description: PRD-01 load replay report contract (D-04 SLO v1.0 gates). Reports MUST NOT contain raw API keys, Authorization/Cookie headers, request or response bodies, DSN strings, full upstream URLs with embedded credentials, or PII. Forbidden property names anywhere in the document: api_key, authorization, cookie, bearer, prompt_text, response_text, headers, body, dsn, password, secret. Validators MAY enforce this via additional pattern checks; this schema enforces `additionalProperties: false` at every nested object as a structural backstop. Gate names map verbatim to D-04: P95 chat ≤5s + embed ≤1s + STT ≤10s + error <1% non-503 + zero 5xx panic. `zero_5xx_panic` is an EXTERNAL OBSERVATION populated by the operator post-run based on Sentry + gateway-log dual query (see `gates_external_inputs`); the replay engine MUST write null. `all_passed` MUST be null until every gate has a non-null value — never compute true with an unverified panic count.

summary.description: P50/P95/P99 per route + counters. Per-route record has EXACTLY n/p50_ms/p95_ms/p99_ms — no raw latencies, no body sizes, no tenant identifiers (the report aggregates across tenants for privacy).

errors.description: Aggregated error counters by short error_class label. NO raw bodies, NO headers, NO upstream URLs — labels are short pre-vetted enum strings only.

zero_5xx_panic.description: EXTERNAL OBSERVATION ONLY. Set by operator post-run based on (1) Sentry query: level=fatal AND service=ifix-ai-gateway over [started_at, finished_at]; AND (2) gateway log grep: 'docker logs ifix-ai-gateway --since <started_at> --until <finished_at> | grep -c "^panic:"'. Reports written by load-replay.py MUST set this to null; recoverers do NOT leak panic strings so response-body inference is forbidden. closes reviews LOW #4.

all_passed.description: AND of the 5 gates above. MUST be null when any gate is null — never compute true with an unverified zero_5xx_panic.

gates_external_inputs.description: Audit trail for the zero_5xx_panic gate. The replay engine pre-fills sentry_query_url + log_grep_command scoped to [started_at, finished_at]. The operator sets verified_at when flipping the gate.

sentry_query_url.description: Sentry URL pre-filled with run-window scope (level=fatal AND service=ifix-ai-gateway).

log_grep_command.description: Exact docker-logs grep command for `panic:` count over the run window.

verified_at.description: ISO-8601 set when operator flips zero_5xx_panic; null until then.
